ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the flight is on */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the flight */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the flight */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight, often used in booking systems */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available on the flight */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats still available for booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code of the airline (e.g., AA, UA) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "frequent_flyer_program" TEXT /* Name of the airline's frequent flyer program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "from_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the route starts at */,
  "to_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport the route ends at */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the route in kilometers or miles */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the route is serviced (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_to_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_from_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the airport is in */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the airport (e.g., NY, CA) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the airport is in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class (e.g., Economy, Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "baggage_allowance" TEXT /* Baggage allowance for the travel class */,
  "meal_service" TEXT /* Whether meal service is included in the travel class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the fare is for */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel class the fare is for */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the fare is effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date until which the fare is valid */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or restrictions on the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home or billing address of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who made the booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the booking is for */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Travel class of the booking */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the passenger */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Debit Card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
